english_text: I came to pay my respects
Is there anything I can do
They are in a better place now
How is the family holding up
I'll keep you in my thoughts
The viewing hours are from when to when
How many days is the funeral
I came as soon as I heard
If you need anything call me
The deceased was a wonderful person
I have fond memories of them
They wouldn't want you to be sad
They will always be in our hearts
I'll bring food for the family
You need to take care of yourself
Let me know about the memorial date
We visit the grave on Chuseok
May their soul rest in peace
